mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND checkin_date = #{checkinDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_checkin (user_id, checkin_date, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{checkinDate}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT checkin_date, DATEDIFF(checkin_date, '1970-01-01') - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY checkin_date) AS grp FROM user_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY checkin_date DESC ) t WHERE grp = (SELECT DATEDIFF(MAX(checkin_date), '1970-01-01') - 1 FROM user_checkin WHERE user_id = #{userId})
